episodes.title: #37: R' Yoel Yeshia Heshil Blum - אידיש: הרב יואל יושע העשיל בלום
episodes.description:
For the thirty seventh episode, Shloime sits down with R’ Yoel Yeshia Heshil Blum to discuss the takedown of Lev Tahor, as well as the history of the cult, and what is being done to hold those responsible, accountable.

For those without Internet access, you can listen to my new Teef Teef (Yiddish) Podcast over the phone by calling: +1.605.477.1888
